a:r.a:t: AI-gated flow across AVEVA design tools and the API-built PLM
Design in AVEVA (E3D/Marine + Draw) → governed & tracked in the API-built PLM, AI-gated at every step
Approver signs off in the API-built PLM
AI gate at every step = error check + anomaly diagnosis · PASS → auto-promote · FAIL → block & flag (no promote)
PLM live status: modeled → DWG issued → MTO extracted → approved → scoped → baselined → ECO closed → released → approved
AVEVA E3D/Marine 3D → AVEVA Draw 2D (AutoCAD DWG/DXF) → MTO/E-BOM →
Future PLM - API workspace · served at /
